# SSLContext

**Class**

An opaque type that represents an SSL session context object.

## Declaration

```swift
class SSLContext
```

## Overview

The SSL session context object references the state associated with a session. You can’t reuse an SSL session context in multiple sessions.

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
